headline: Repurchases of shares by EQT AB during week 14, 2026
summary: Between 30 March 2026 and 2 April 2026 EQT AB (LEI code 213800U7P9GOIRKCTB34) ("EQT") has repurchased in total 252,671 own ordinary shares (ISIN: SE0012853455).

headline: EQT Life Sciences to exit minority stake in Tubulis via sale to Gilead Sciences for up to USD 5.0 billion
summary: EQT Life Sciences is pleased to announce that the LSP 7 fund ("EQT Life Sciences") has exited its minority stake in Tubulis (the "Company"), a Germany-based, clinical-stage biotechnology company developing next-generation antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs), through a sale to Gilead Sciences [Nasdaq: GILD].

headline: What to Expect From EQT’s Q1 2026 Earnings Report
summary: EQT is ready to release its fiscal first-quarter results in the near term, and analysts forecast a modest single-digit growth in earnings.

headline: Energy Stocks: Winners And Losers At The Beginning Of Q2 2026
summary: Q1 2026 was an exceptional quarter for energy stocks thanks to war in the Middle East, but Q2 2026 is not guaranteed to step in its footsteps.
